name: Salona Cotspin Limited
summary: Salona Cotspin Limited produces and sells cotton textile products in India. The company offers cotton, blended, ring spin, open end, slub, hank, and compact yarn products, as well as knitted fabrics and apparels. It also provides grey, dyed, and printed fabrics. The company also exports its yarns and fabrics to Sri Lanka, Bangladesh, Hong Kong, South Korea, Germany, Mexico, South America, Russia, etc. Salona Cotspin Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
